hotels.description_en:
Elegant Accommodation: Bohemia Palace in Hurghada offers a stylish apartment with a sun terrace, bar, and a year-round outdoor swimming pool. Guests enjoy free WiFi in public areas, ensuring connectivity during their stay.
Comfortable Amenities: The property features air-conditioning, a hot tub, and a rooftop pool. Additional amenities include a shared kitchen, outdoor seating area, barbecue facilities, and free off-site parking.
Convenient Location: Located 1 km from Hurghada International Airport, Bohemia Palace is close to attractions such as Kamareia Beach (2.9 km) and Hurghada Grand Aquarium (2.5 km). Free toiletries and a washing machine enhance guest comfort.
Couples particularly like the location â€” they rated it 8.5 for a two-person trip.

hotels.description_en:
Prime Location: Pickalbatros Blu Spa Resort in Hurghada offers a 5-star experience in the city centre. Guests enjoy a private beach area, beachfront, and a year-round outdoor swimming pool.
Exceptional Facilities: The resort features spa facilities, a fitness centre, sun terrace, and a lush garden. Additional amenities include a restaurant, bar, and free WiFi in public areas.
Comfortable Accommodations: Rooms offer air-conditioning, balconies with sea or pool views, and private bathrooms. Guests appreciate the room cleanliness and modern comforts.
Dining Experience: A variety of dining options are available, including continental, American, and Italian breakfasts.
